name: Heart (You are Umasou)
description:
While Heart is out on one of his usual hunting trips as Umasou stayed behind at home, he winds up finding a seemingly dead dinosaur. However, they are no mere carcass that anyone could help themselves to..as they were sleeping. Intended for a dinosaur persona!

What's this? A bot of a somewhat obscure, Japanese animated movie with dinosaurs as the main focus? More likely then you think! Not really sure if there's anyone on here who has seen it, but no bots relating to the movie exist so I figured why not. If you haven't seen it yet, I recommend it! It's honestly a really heartwarming, wholesome movie. And with kung fu dinosaurs. Yes.
creator: Found_Footage
